message:
fix(sync): resolve semaphore significant_drop_tightening lint + add audit regression tests

Flatten add_permits() to use explicit drop(state) after extracting the
waker, eliminating clippy::significant_drop_tightening warning. Add 7
regression tests covering: permit saturation at usize::MAX, close during
owned acquire, FIFO enforcement on try_acquire, owned permit lifecycle,
cancel/drop-front-waiter cascading wakes, and waker update on re-poll.

Bead: asupersync-10x0x.50

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
